title: We are a Great Place to Work!
content:
Today, we celebrate our culture! We have landed in the 10th spot at the Great Place to Work® survey in the TOP 15 list of mid-sized companies in Finland.

In this video our people are holding up signs with the words that mean the most to them about working at Dittmar & Indrenius. There were no scripts, no directors, just the cardboard signs and black markers for them to write down the things they genuinely love about coming to work every day.

“Being recognised as a Great Place to Work® means a lot to us, not because of the ranking itself, but because of what it reflects. I believe our culture is what truly sets us apart: we are deeply goal-oriented, yet wholly humane, and those two things are not in contradiction here. Our culture shows in the way we work with our clients and in the relationships we build along the way. But that does not happen by itself: it takes consistent work and staying humble enough to keep listening and always improving.” Gabrielle Dannberg, Managing Partner, reflects.

“Our Cultural Cornerstones are not just words on a wall. Team

creator: Elina Immonen-Seise

title: Ajankohtaista listayhtiöille: Kestävyysraportoinnin tulevaisuus ja muutoksia sisäpiiritiedon lykkäämissääntelyyn 29.4.2026
content:
Kestävyysraportointisääntely on ollut viime aikoina myllerryksen kohteena. EU:n Omnibus I -lainsäädännön myötä moni suomalainen yhtiö on pudonnut pois kestävyysraportointidirektiivin (CSRD) soveltamisalalta. Vaikka varmennettu raportti olisikin laadittu vielä tilikaudelta 2025, uudistunut sääntely avaa mahdollisuuden tarkastella tarkoituksenmukaista raportointia kuluvalta tilikaudelta.

Tilaisuudessa vaihdamme ajatuksia vastuullisuus- ja kestävyysraportoinnin tulevaisuudesta. Vieraspuhujanamme on Suomen Tilintarkastajat ry:n toiminnanjohtaja Sanna Alakare, joka avaa asiaa etenkin kestävyysraportoinnin varmennuksen näkökulmasta.

Jos et ole saanut kutsua tilaisuuteen ja haluaisit osallistua, voit olla yhteydessä:
creator: Rakel Markkanen

title: Top ranked by Chambers Europe 2026
content:

title: Our Employment team ranked Band 1 in Chambers Europe 2026
content:
We are delighted to announce that our Employment, Benefits and Pensions practice has once again been awarded BAND 1 ranking in the Chambers and Partners Europe results.

In addition, we are proud to achieve four individual high rankings, recognising all our employment partners Suvi Knaapila, Seppo Havia, Petteri Uoti and Mika Kärkkäinen. 

These results reflect the extraordinary depth of expertise within our team and our unwavering commitment to delivering exceptional employment law advice.

Client experience is at the heart of everything we do, and we couldn’t be more pleased to hear our clients share feedback such as this:

“They pay attention to every detail, ask the right questions and ensure that all perspectives are considered. Their business understanding is also at a high level. As a client, I feel confident when working with them.”

title: Merger Control in 2026
content:
– Should you expect the unexpected?

Below-threshold mergers and call-in rights, evolving theories of harm, an ongoing review of the EU Merger Guidelines and new approaches to remedies – it is evident that significant merger control policy changes are underway, as competition authorities and policy makers alike are struggling to adapt the existing merger control framework to the current market realities. While no changes to either the Finnish Competition Act or the EU Merger Regulation (“EUMR”) are expected in 2026, the Finnish Competition and Consumer Authority (“FCCA”) has been vocal about the changes to merger control it would like to see. Against this backdrop, companies should be prepared for new developments within the current merger control framework.

In this article, lawyers Mirva Arvola and Emilia Rosenblad address the evolving merger control landscape in 2026 and consider how companies can best position themselves to address unforeseen issues arising in connection with merger control.
snippet: – Should you expect the unexpected? Below-threshold mergers and call-in rights, evolving theories of harm, an ongoing review of the EU Merger Guidelines and new approaches to remedies – it is evident
creator: Elina Immonen-Seise

title: Fututalks 2026 – Suomen punainen lanka
content:
Olemme mukana Fututalks 2026 -tapahtumassa, joka kokoaa elinkeinoelämän, politiikan, tieteen ja kulttuurin kirkkaimmat äänet rakentamaan yhteistä visiota Suomelle.

Missä Suomi voisi olla maailman paras?

Jukka Lång osallistuu paneelikeskusteluun “Missä Suomi voisi olla maailman paras?”. Paneelissa pohditaan Suomen elinkeinoelämän ja teknologian vahvuuksia, innovointikykyä käytännössä ja sitä, kuinka näitä vahvuuksia voidaan hyödyntää kestävän kasvun tueksi.

Jukan rinnalla paneelissa keskustelevat Risto Siilasmaa, sijoittaja ja perustaja F-Secure & WithSecure, Pauliina Martikainen-Rahnu General Partner Maki.vc ja Perttu Pölönen futuristi ja tietokirjailija.

Lisätietoa päivän ohjelmasta ja tilaisuudesta voit lukea Fututalksin verkkosivuilta fututalks.com

Tapahtumaa voi seurata myös ilmaisen livestriimin kautta. Ilmoittaudu livestriimi
